meaning: n.[药]灭滴灵,甲硝哒唑(抗滴虫药)
examples: Metronidazole is the drug of choice in pregnancy.
Objective: To establish the for quality control of Metronidazole Chloramphenicol Liniment.
A HPLC method for determining metronidazole (MTZ), ronidazole (RNZ) and dimetridazole (DMZ) in chicken muscle was developed.
Such drugs have side-effects, however: not only do they lead to antibiotic-resistant bacteria, but some, such as metronidazole, can be dangerous in their own right.
